name: Health Catalyst, Inc.
summary: Health Catalyst, Inc. is a leading provider of data and analytics technology and services to healthcare organizations. Its Solution comprises a cloud-based data and analytics platform (Health Catalyst Ignite), software analytics applications, and expertise/managed services. Clients, primarily healthcare providers, use the Solution to manage data, derive analytical insights, and produce measurable clinical, financial, and operational improvements. The company is migrating existing DOS platform clients to its new Ignite platform.

products.name: Health Catalyst Ignite
products.description: New cloud-based data and analytics platform replacing the legacy DOS platform for healthcare organizations.

products.description: Legacy cloud-based data platform being migrated to Health Catalyst Ignite.

products.description: Analytics applications delivering insights to measurably improve and automate healthcare processes and drive efficiency.
